projectDescription: An ESPHome external component that enables ESP32/ESP8266 devices to monitor and control Jikong Battery Management Systems (JK-BMS) via UART-TTL or Bluetooth Low Energy.
keyFeatures: Monitor JK-BMS cell voltages, temperatures, and pack-level stats via UART-TTL or BLE
Control charging, discharging, and balancing switches remotely
Support for three BLE protocol versions: JK02_24S, JK02_32S, and JK04
Read and write BMS protection settings and calibration values over BLE
Support for NEEY/Heltec 4A Smart Active Balancer via BLE
Native ESPHome integration with Home Assistant and MQTT
Multi-device support for monitoring multiple BMS units simultaneously
publicApiSurface: jk_bms (UART component): sensor, binary_sensor, switch, text_sensor platforms
jk_bms_ble (BLE component): sensor, binary_sensor, switch, text_sensor, button, number platforms
heltec_balancer_ble (BLE component): sensor, binary_sensor, switch, text_sensor, button, number, select platforms
jk_bms_display (Display port component): sensor, binary_sensor platforms
jk_balancer_modbus (Modbus bus component for JK-PB series)
